category_sources: source_facts.description: Nu Markup Checker: command-line and server HTML validator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies Nu Markup Checker; official validator site titles the project Nu Html Checker (vnu).
docs_sources: Official validator.github.io site documents usage, releases, web-based checking, Docker, build instructions, and additional documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official validator site states vnu source code is available on GitHub and gives git clone https://github.com/validator/validator.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a command-line and server HTML validator; official validator site describes checking HTML, CSS, and SVG from CLI and service modes.
